channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Ferrari sign Leclerc on new long-term contract before home F1 Monaco GP
item.description: Charles Leclerc has extended his contract with Ferrari for an undisclosed length, having joined the F1 team in 2019.

item.title: Israel is building more military posts in Gaza, satellite imagery shows
item.description: An investigation by Al Jazeera has identified 40 distinct Israeli military outposts entrenched within Gaza.

item.title: Iran, Kuwait, Bahrain hit: Is the war in the Gulf escalating again?
item.description: Secretary of State Rubio tells US lawmakers the war on Iran is over, amid recent attacks on Iran and Gulf countries.

item.title: Morocco World Cup 2026 preview: Players to watch, group and squad list
item.description: The Atlas Lions aim to better their historic 2022 semifinal appearance but have had a chaotic run-in.

item.title: Israel’s invasion of southern Lebanon devastates centuries of history
item.description: From Phoenician temples to Crusader castles, heritage sites bear the brunt of Israel's expanding military offensive.

item.title: Cape Verde football team arrives in the US for the World Cup
item.description: Cape Verde’s national football team has arrived in the US ahead to take part in their first ever FIFA World Cup.

item.title: US artist sues FIFA over destruction of Dallas whale mural for World Cup
item.description: Wyland's mural stood for nearly three decades before workers began painting over it last month to promote the World Cup.

item.title: Hilton, Becerra lead California governor race: Key primary election results
item.description: California, Iowa, New Jersey, New Mexico, Montana and South Dakota held key primaries on Tuesday.

item.title: Fire at New Delhi hotel kills at least 21 people
item.description: It took eight fire engines to extinguish the blaze, as more than 40 people were rescued and taken to nearby hospitals.

item.title: Remembering Muhammad Ali’s message of peace
item.description: Ten years after his passing, Ali’s words remind us of what we must do amid today’s conflicts and divisions.

item.title: How social media changes the way we see war
item.description: We see war now as we see everything else - through a screen.

item.title: Hezbollah video shows attack on Israeli troops at Lebanon’s Beaufort Castle
item.description: Hezbollah has released drone video showing attacks targeting Israeli forces occupying Beaufort Castle

item.title: UK-China ‘ice age’ thaws: Why the West needs Beijing
item.description: British Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper hails ‘candour and respect’ in new ties with Beijing, despite differences.

item.title: Democrat and Republican go head-to-head in California governor race
item.description: California could have its first Republican governor since Arnold Schwarzenegger ended his two terms in 2011.

item.title: US ‘disables’ ship allegedly bound for Iranian port
item.description: US Central Command released video of it targeting a tanker that it says was en route to Iran’s Kharg Island in the Gulf.

item.title: Foreign nationals among 21 dead in fire in Indian capital
item.description: Firefighters rescue more than 40 people trapped inside as thick smoke fills the burning New Delhi building.

item.title: Iranian drone attack kills one in Kuwait after US strikes Qeshm Island
item.description: Gulf country's airport is hit as clashes go on with diplomacy between Washington and Tehran showing little progress.

item.title: Can a US president promote stock they’ve invested in
item.description: Can a US president promote stock they’ve invested in

item.title: ‘Service is the rent we pay’: Muhammad Ali remembered 10 years on
item.description: Ten years after the boxing legend’s death, widow Lonnie Ali urges a 'day of compassion' as US divisions deepen.

item.title: US broadcaster CBS fires 60 Minutes’s Scott Pelley after clash with bosses
item.description: Veteran journalist's dismissal comes after he reportedly accused management of 'murdering' influential news programme.

item.title: Is the Great Nicobar Island India’s Hormuz-like chokepoint against China?
item.description: Far away from Indian mainland, the government is pumping billions of dollars into a controversial development project.

item.title: Unfancied Brazil will stay sharp at the World Cup, Casemiro says
item.description: Brazil are aiming for a record-extending sixth world title at the 2026 tournament in North America.

item.title: Ukraine drone attack kills 7 in Russian-held territory in new escalation
item.description: The Russian-installed head of Donetsk, Denis Pushilin, says a drone hit a bus travelling between Moscow and Simferopol.

item.title: Outrage over UK police arrest video of dying student
item.description: Footage of police arresting a dying student has set off heated protests in the UK.

item.title: Messi trains alone as Argentina hold first World Cup practice
item.description: Messi works on 'specific exercises' as he recovers from muscle fatigue in his left hamstring before the World Cup.
